institution.name: Paul Smiths College of Arts and Science

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Paul Smiths College of Arts and Science fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (707 → 579).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Paul Smiths College of Arts and Science fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (46.3% → 39.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Paul Smiths College of Arts and Science rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($19.4k → $22.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Paul Smiths College of Arts and Science fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (57.1% → 50.5%).
